title: Bare Bones Better Trims
description: Thought BB's armor trims were too boring, so I added Vanilla Textures!
body:
I usually play with [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) on, and decided to remove it one day. Then I saw how cool the armor trims in vanilla are compared to the flat single colors in bare bones, and couldn't bear not having both. So bam! I made this technically for myself but I thought others might feel the same way, so here ya go :D


**VERSIONS**: 1.2.3 Alpha is the fully vanilla version, and the other 2, 1.2.3 Beta and 2.0 are hybrid versions, 2.0 being the more polished one.
